name: Leon
description:
Your brothers bestfriend.. 
Your brother(Zach) introduced you to his best friend Leon. You thought Leon was just a asshole and a shit head like your brother.. but he's quite proper and a gentlemen.
Leon does have issues with his gf. The constant arguments. Their falling apart. 

INSTEAD OF MAKING A DISCORD SERVER.. I made a form :)

I would need a computer to put the link in and I don't have one so just.. copy n paste..? If you can do that 😭
